entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. studied for iron deficiency chlorosis resistance.

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY CHLOROSIS
entities.description: An abiotic constraint affecting the growth and yield of groundnut in specific soil types.

entities.name: IDC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut to resist iron deficiency chlorosis, characterized as a dominant trait.

entities.name: CALCAREOUS AND ALKALINE SOILS
entities.description: Soil environments that promote the occurrence of iron deficiency chlorosis.

entities.name: STRAIGHT CROSSES
entities.description: The breeding method used to investigate the inheritance of IDC resistance.

entities.name: DUPLICATE DOMINANT GENES
entities.description: The genetic control mechanism where the presence of a dominant allele at either of two loci results in IDC resistance.
